DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRules1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRules2: 2 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere in Main Game awards Single Free Spin with a randomly chosen Feature: Diao Chan Free Spin, Dong Zhuo Free Spin, Lu Bu Free Spin.
DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRules3: Single Free Spin wins are added to "Win" meter.
DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRules4: 3 or more Scatter symbols appearing anywhere in Main Game awards Free Spins Feature where the player can choose 1 out of 3 Features to be played during Free Spins Feature: 8 Diao Chan Free Spins, 10 Dong Zhuo Free Spins, 12 Lu Bu Free Spins.
DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRules5: When Free Spins Feature is triggered by 4 or 5 scatter symbols, all wins for that Free Spins Feature will be multiplied by 2 or 4 respectively.
DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRules6: Free Spins Feature wins are added to "Win" meter.
DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRules7: Scatter symbol does not appear during Single Free Spin and Free Spins Feature.
DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRules8: During Diao Chan Free Spin(s), when one or more Wild symbols appear anywhere on any of the reels, each Wild symbol will expand across entire reel and replacing all symbols.
DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRules9: During Dong Zhuo Free Spin(s), when one or more Wild symbols appear anywhere on any of the reels, all wins for that spin will be multiplied by 4.
DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRules10: During Lu Bu Free Spin(s), a Lu Bu symbol will remain in centre position of reel 1 throughout the Free Spin(s), and all Dong Zhuo symbol(s) and/or Soldier symbol(s) that appear on the reel(s) are changed to Lu Bu symbol(s). If 4 or more symbols are changed to Lu Bu symbols in a spin, all symbols excluding Wild symbol to the immediate right of the changed symbols are also changed to Lu Bu symbols for that spin.
DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRulesTitle1: Single Free Spin and Free Spins Feature
DiaochanPayoutRulesShared.PayoutRulesTitle2: Characteristics of Diao Chan Free Spin, Dong Zhuo Free Spin and Lu Bu Free Spin

DiaochanRules.Rule1: Honey Trap of Diao Chan is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring Wild substitutions and 3 different types of Single Free Spin or Free Spins Feature.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 30 bet lines (fixed), Bet Level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and Bet Size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip} & %{maxChip} represents numbers, Do not translate, Thank you
Rule2.example: The game is played with 30 bet lines (fixed), Bet Level of 1 to 10 and Bet Size of 0.01 to 10.

DiaochanRules.Rule12: Single Free Spin is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Single Free Spin.
DiaochanRules.Rule13: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
